name: Unicorn Coiled Rope Kids' Storage Cream - Pillowfort™: Polyester Decorative Basket, 1 Round Baskets, 10" Height
description: Declutter your kid's space with this Unicorn Coiled Rope Kids' Storage from Pillowfort™. This round storage basket features a cream coiled construction detailed with a unicorn face and a bright gold horn for a playful, magical look. The open top makes it easy to stash away toys, books and other items. Plus, the two tote handles on top allow for easy carrying.
